---

## About

Cybersecurity student enrolled in a **Bachelor of Technology in Networks & Telecommunications** (Cybersecurity track) in France. Passionate about offensive security, network analysis, and digital forensics.

---

## Skills

<div align="center">

| Domain | Level |
|:---|:---:|
| Pentesting & Offensive Security | `Intermediate` |
| Web Security | `Intermediate` |
| Network & Infrastructure | `Advanced` |
| Forensics & Defense | `Learning` |
| OSINT | `Intermediate` |

</div>

---
